action.reasoning: Observation: 0% success rate after 2M steps training. The model is not learning at all. Analysis: Two likely issues: (1) predict.py loads PPO without custom_objects for the feature extractor - SB3 needs to know about MinigridFeaturesExtractor when loading; (2) The training might not be working due to the complex multi-task setup. Let me verify by checking if the model loads correctly and also simplify the approach. I'll use SB3's built-in MlpPolicy with FlatObsWrapper (minigrid provides this) which converts the dict obs to a flat vector - this is simpler and more reliable. Also fix predict.py to use the same wrapper. The key insight: minigrid has ImgObsWrapper and FlatObsWrapper built-in that simplify observation handling.
